overview: A read-heavy synchronous search service backed by Postgres with JSONB + tsvector + pg_trgm.
architecture: Layered: Controller → SearchService → SearchRepository → Postgres. Caching via Redis with 60s TTL.

components.name: SearchController
components.responsibility: HTTP entry point; param validation; rate-limit check.

components.name: SearchService
components.responsibility: Orchestrate search; merge results across entity types; apply ranking.

components.name: SearchRepository
components.responsibility: Postgres queries with pg_trgm and tsvector; per-query statement timeout.

components.name: RankingPolicy
components.responsibility: Score results by relevance + recency; return ordered list.

data_model: tsvector column on briefs.search_doc; GIN index. JSONB metadata column. trigram index on briefs.title.
alternatives: Considered Elasticsearch (rejected: operational overhead). Considered SQLite FTS (rejected: insufficient at our scale).
risks: DB failover causes search outage. Mitigation: circuit-break with cached partial results.
